title: DMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Manager/ Manager Posts
short_info: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website www.delhimetrorail.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMRC Assistant Manager/Manager (Inspection) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Minimum Age 55 years, Maximum Age 62 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Experience in inspection of manufacturing of Railway/Metro Coaches
qualification.details: Manager (Inspection) / Assistant Manager (Inspection): Work experience in the inspection of manufacturing of Railway/Metro Coaches, or, experience in maintenance of Railway/Metro Rolling Stock, or, experience in Railway Workshops/Railway Production Units.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.delhimetrorail.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
